name: Chicken & Bacon Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the diced cooked chicken, diced crisp bacon, diced celery, and chopped hard-boiled eggs.
2. In another bowl, mix together the mayonnaise and chili sauce.
3. Add the chicken mixture to the mayonnaise and chili sauce mixture.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Chill before serving.
